cultural_notes.free_notes: Tanoor/skewer-based grilled chicken is culturally authentic to Saudi Arabia and the Levantine region. Product appears to be a branded chicken wrap or sandwich offering. Clean, appetizing presentation with professional studio lighting. No cultural sensitivities detected.
